PLF Core:
PLF Road Map
!
Executive Summary
Now we’re going to give you a road map and cover what’s actually inside
Product Launch Formula. This is a big program and there’s a lot of content,
but as I often say it’s all about the “baby steps”.
Think of your journey through PLF like a baby taking small steps.
Sometimes they fall down, but they get right back up and keep walking. If
you get just 20% of PLF right, you can still win.
Even today I still make mistakes in my launches, but it’s all about following
the formula.
!
Module 1
This is where you’ll get the core strategies and tactics - this is what
makes PLF work. The core work applies to all types of launches. You’ll
go through some exercises as well, and can apply this to all your
launches.
Module 2
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 3 --

We take the work from Module 1 and begin to develop your Launch
Theme and Launch Story. We dig into your P.S. Path, a critical piece of
your launch. We’ll also cover the Business Launch Formula and a lot of
the tools we use.
Module 3
We cover the Seed Launch and Quick launch. The Seed Launch is
perfect for people that don’t have a product or list (or just creating a new
one), and it’s awesome because you literally get paid to create your
product. The Quick Launch is great if you already have a product and
offer, but you want a quick infusion of money.
Module 4
The Internal Launch - this is the classic sideways sales letter style
launch that’s specifically to your list. They’re fun to do and you have
complete control over all the aspects. We also go deep into creating pre-
launch content in this module.
Module 5
This is where I go deep into breaking down actual pre-launch videos
from my students. I show you exactly what’s right and wrong in each of
these videos - one of my personal favorite modules.
Module 6
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Here we go over sales videos, and I’ll again take real sales videos and
go through them individually. In addition, we’ll cover JV launches which
are very exciting.
Module 7
Surprise! This is a special bonus module all about the Evergreen launch.
Once you’ve created your launch you can begin to automate PLF year-
round for your business, and you can re-use the material from your
previous modules.
Overall, we start with simple, core work. As we nail that down we move into
the details and how it applies to your actual launch.
Plus, you already have access to the Launch Your List bonus course, and
you’ll get access to the Product Creation Course a bit later.
Remember, community is key! Leave a comment on this video and tell me,
what’s your path through PLF going to look like?
!
